highlights: Developed event-driven Java/Apache Camel microservices handling 1k+ fulfilment statuses per minute.
Reduced monthly AWS cloud costs by ~80% by re-architecting queue processors to Lambda and right-sizing ECS tasks found via performing custom Gatling load tests.
Built a high-concurrency Golang tool to migrate multi-TB order datasets from Elasticsearch to DynamoDB.
Modernized 4 core microservices (Java 21, SpringBoot 3, AWS SDK v2), eliminating security vulnerabilities and boosting performance.
Developed a core event-publishing library (SNS/API orchestration), adopted across multiple microservices to process 100k+ messages daily.
Built high-performance RESTful APIs for processing gift card workflows and fetching order and shipment details.
Designed and developed an automation testing framework with Cucumber, improving integration testing coverage across services.
Developed a Slack bot in Python using AWS Lambda and API Gateway to handle slash commands for daily operational workflows.
Developed Python scripts for synchronizing data between tables along with report generation for monitoring.
Implemented REST APIs for enabling seamless operations across a multi-tenant DB2 database.
Migrated a legacy web application from Perl to Python reducing technical debt and improving maintainability.
Implemented REST APIs for a custom store to onboard U.S. educational institutions for device procurement workflows.
Implemented REST APIs for a content management system backed by Cassandra.

projects.name: feeder
projects.description: A self-hosted application written in Python and Flask to convert any website into an RSS feed

projects.name: pse
projects.description: A self-hosted custom full-text search engine using Golang and SQLite FTS5 extension
